uiBuilder.label: Survey Version Item
uiBuilder.description: A survey version-history row: status icon, title, optional LATEST badge, created date and trigger reason. Clicking the row emits an event. Composes now-card + now-icon.

properties.name: itemTitle
properties.label: Item title
properties.description: Title of the version item (e.g. Survey Result -V3).

properties.name: showLatestBadge
properties.label: Show latest badge
properties.description: Show or hide the badge next to the title.

properties.name: badgeColor
properties.label: Badge colour
properties.description: Colour of the badge (token-driven status colours).

properties.name: createdLabel
properties.label: Created label
properties.description: Label text before the creation date.

properties.name: triggeredByLabel
properties.label: Triggered by label
properties.description: Label text before the trigger reason.

properties.name: triggeredByValue
properties.label: Triggered by value
properties.description: The reason or cause that triggered this version.

properties.name: showStatusIcon
properties.label: Show status icon
properties.description: Show or hide the status icon on the left.

properties.name: isCompleted
properties.label: Is completed
properties.description: When true the row uses the completed icon and positive colour; otherwise the pending icon and muted colour.

properties.name: completedIcon
properties.label: Completed icon
properties.description: now-icon name shown when the item is completed.

properties.name: pendingIcon
properties.label: Pending icon
properties.description: now-icon name shown when the item is not completed.

properties.name: clickable
properties.label: Clickable
properties.description: When on, the row is clickable and emits the Survey version item clicked event.

properties.name: hideShadow
properties.label: Hide shadow
properties.description: When on, the card has no drop shadow (flat row with a hairline border). Turn off for a raised card.

actions.name: SURVEY_VERSION_ITEM_CLICKED
actions.label: Survey version item clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks the version item row (only when Clickable is on).

payload.name: itemTitle
payload.label: Item title
payload.description: Title of the clicked version item.

payload.name: createdDate
payload.label: Created date
payload.description: Creation date of the clicked item.

payload.name: isCompleted
payload.label: Is completed
payload.description: Whether the item is in the completed state.
